extract: Blizzard redirects here. For the weather condition, see Hail (weather condition). Blizzard (Japanese: ふぶき Blizzard) is a damage-dealing Ice-type move introduced in Generation I. It is: TM14 from Generation I to Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon and in Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl. TM51 in Pokémon: Let's Go, Pikachu! and Let's Go, Eevee!. TR06 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM143 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet. TM105 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.
